/usr/bin/cc    CMakeFiles/pub.dir/src/pub.c.o CMakeFiles/pub.dir/src/free/free.c.o CMakeFiles/pub.dir/src/modbus_init/modbus_init.c.o CMakeFiles/pub.dir/src/read_gg/read_gg.c.o CMakeFiles/pub.dir/src/read_sg/read_sg.c.o CMakeFiles/pub.dir/src/read_uci/read_uci.c.o CMakeFiles/pub.dir/src/write_register/write_register.c.o  -o pub  -lubus -lubox -luci -lblobmsg_json -lmodbus
